Localization.Description: There are signs of using the KrbRelay or DavRelayUp utility, which allows you to use the lack of signature of LDAP requests to relay the authentication process and receive a TGS ticket for the SPN account on behalf of the administrator. After that, an attacker can elevate their privileges to a local administrator and execute malicious code on a compromised node

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The signs of KrbRelay|DavRelayUp utility usage with the local authentication of the user {subject.account.name} using a Kerberos relayed ticket are detected on host {event_src.host}

The signs of KrbRelay|DavRelayUp utility usage with the creation interface {datafield2} by process {subject.process.name}, followed by a connection to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} are detected on host {event_src.host}
